title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Arihant Publications

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Arihant Publications
jsonLd.description:
Arihant Publications invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Arihant Publications:
Arihant Publications is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications!
